name: LeakyReLU² + TTT + BigramHash(20480) + MLP3.5x
blurb: Built on PR #549 stack (LeakyReLU(0.5)² + Legal TTT + Parallel Muon). Added BigramHash(20480) for richer bigram features and MLP 3.5x for more capacity. Both improvements validated across 5 rounds of experiments on RTX 4090.
author: deepchand
